title: Moody's: It's Time To Rate This Ratings Agency
text: Moody's is a market leader in credit and debt ratings existing as one of the key players in what is a natural oligopoly. The company had a slow start in FY23 but showed strong performance in Q3 and has a relatively healthy outlook for full year 2023. Moody's wide economic moat, strong financial performance and incredibly well managed balance sheets make it an attractive long-term buy-and-hold, in my opinion.

title: Why Is Moody's (MCO) Up 17.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Moody's (MCO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Moody's: Reiterate Buy As Performance Outpaces My Expectations
text: Moody's 3Q23 performance exceeded expectations, demonstrating strong growth momentum. Moody's Investors Service and Moody's Analytics both experienced impressive growth in various segments. Moody's AI development and partnerships with Microsoft and Google indicate promising future growth.

title: Moody's (MCO) Gains From Strategic Buyouts Despite Cost Woes
text: Moody's (MCO) is well-placed on the back of its dominant position in the credit rating industry, constant efforts to diversify its revenue base and synergies from strategic buyouts.

title: Moody's Is The Perfect Stock For My Portfolio
text: Moody's Corporation is a financial powerhouse with a $65 billion market cap, offering credit ratings, financial research, and next-gen services. The company has a strong recurring revenue base, with 70% of its revenue being recurring, leading to rapid growth in key financials. Moody's showed strong growth in its most recent quarter, with overall revenue growth of 15% and improved operating margins. The company is actively investing in innovation and new technologies.

title: Moody's Corporation Posted an Updated Management Presentation for Investors
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) posted an updated management presentation for investors on its website, ir.moodys.com, on Thursday, November 16, 2023. This presentation reflects certain information regarding the Company's results for the three months ended September 30, 2023 as well as its full-year 2023 guidance as of October 25, 2023, and its posting is provided pursuant to Regulation FD. Senior management may use this updated presentation during meetings with analy.

title: The Fed Turns Hawkish, Moody's Turns Negative, And A Shutdown Looms
text: In my opinion, last week's comments from the Federal Reserve Chair were performative and don't change anything in terms of my outlook. Central banks are focused on ensuring that longer-term inflation expectations - not shorter-term ones - are "well-anchored.

title: Bank of America, JPMorgan Chase and Wells Fargo shares shrug off Moody's outlook cut to negative from stable
text: Moody's Investors Service cut its rating outlook to negative from stable on Bank of America Corp., JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Wells Fargo & Co., but the stocks rallied Tuesday on the heels of tame inflation data.

title: Moody's Just Issued a Big U.S. Credit Rating Warning for Investors
text: It's one thing when an individual's credit rating declines. However, a recent credit rating warning from Moody's applies to the entire country, or more accurately, to the U.S. government as a borrower of capital.

title: US stocks drop as investors assess Moody's outlook and brace for October inflation data
text: US stocks fell on Monday as traders took in Moody's outlook for the US credit rating. The agency downgraded its outlook from "stable" to "negative" as concerns over the US debt build.

title: Moody's Corporation to Present at the J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference on November 16, 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) announced today that Rob Fauber, President and Chief Executive Officer, will speak at the J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference on Thursday, November 16, 2023. Mr. Fauber's presentation will begin at approximately 3:35 p.m. Eastern Time and the audio will be webcast live. title: Why Warren Buffett has done more to educate investors than any other corporate executive
text: Warren Buffett, the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, is world famous and a closely watched market force. Berkshire is a big shareholder of Apple, one of the seven big tech companies that currently dominate the U.S. stock market.

title: Moody's creates private credit rating and research group
text: Ratings agency Moody's is creating a unit to research and rate private credit, the firm said on Monday.

title: Moody's creates new private credit analytical franchise, appoints Ana Arsov to lead
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) today announced the creation of a new analytical franchise within Moody's Investors Service (MIS), the rating agency, that will focus on delivering strategic insights into the rapidly expanding private credit sector. Ana Arsov has been named Global Head of Private Credit, and will lead coordination of relevant research and rating initiatives across MIS. Ms. Arsov will also co-head the global Financial Institutions Group (FIG) along with.
